test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_cache_pr ( region String, product_id UInt32, val Float64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY region
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO perf_cache_pr SELECT arrayElement(['Europe', 'Asia', 'America', 'Africa', 'Oceania'], (number % 5) + 1), number % 1000, rand() % 10000 FROM numbers(20000000)
SELECT sum(val) FROM perf_cache_pr WHERE region = 'Europe' FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_partial_results = 1
test.query: SELECT sum(val) FROM perf_cache_pr WHERE region = 'Europe' FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(val) FROM perf_cache_pr WHERE region = 'Europe' FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_partial_results = 1
SELECT avg(val), count() FROM perf_cache_pr WHERE region = 'Europe' FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_partial_results = 1
SELECT max(val), min(val), uniqExact(product_id) FROM perf_cache_pr WHERE region = 'Europe' FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_partial_results = 1
